response.justification: While Bogdan possesses over 15 years of robust full-stack and infrastructure engineering experience and demonstrates entrepreneurial drive through founding GISCollective, he lacks the Director-level seniority and deep, recognized AI/ML expertise required for this Principal AI Strategy role. His AI experience appears limited to recent infrastructure tooling rather than the strategic, enterprise-level AI product development and executive advisory skills outlined in the job description.
strengths: Over 15 years of versatile software engineering experience across various tech stacks, including cloud and infrastructure.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial experience as the founder of an open-source Geo-Data platform (GISCollective).
Strong track record of technical community engagement through workshops, conference talks, and open-source contributions.
concerns: Lacks deep, long-term expertise in artificial intelligence and machine learning strategy.
Missing experience functioning at a Director-level individual contributor capacity.
No demonstrated experience advising strategic enterprise customers or partners on cutting-edge cloud and AI adoption.
